title: Object 50
wikitext:
[[zh:诱捕性毛发]] {{DISPLAYTITLE: Object 50: Capillum Aethertemptor}} __NOTOC__ {{Blurimage|file=Capillum Aethertemptor.jpg|caption=Capillum Aethertemptor in an undocumented level}} ==Description== '''Object 50''', scientifically referred to as '''Capillum Aethertemptor''', are thick strands which imitate the texture and appearance of human hair. Their location varies from level to level, they can be observed hanging from the ceiling, no-clipping through walls, or seemingly floating mid-air. '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' typically inhabit dimly lit and uninhabited areas, however they can uncommonly be found within other areas as well. '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' do not appear naturally within the Backrooms' levels, instead they are manually placed by entities. Entities utilize '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' to lure wanderers, they specifically use strands resembling hair to intrigue their prey as hair isn't commonly found within the Backrooms. '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' emit a ginormous glow, making wanderers believe that they have stumbled upon an exit. The location of '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' depends on the intelligence of the entities that place them. Entities which use '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' the most are: [[Entity 10|Skin-Stealers]], [[Entity 9|Facelings]] and [[Entity 5|Clumps]]. Usage of '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' is also utilized when determining an entities intelligence. Wanderers who have encountered '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' have reported feeling a strong urge to walk towards it and touch it, and that no matter how hard they tried they could not resist the impulse. The exact cause of this is unknown, though it is hypothesized to be another anomalous property that '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' possess. The origin of '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' is not yet determined. Some claim that entities steal human hair from wanderers, as they highly resemble real strands of hair, though others claim that they are made by the entities themselves, citing the anomalous characteristics of '''Capillum Aethertemptor'''. ==Locations== As aforementioned, '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' are usually located within darker areas of certain levels. These levels include, but are not limited to: [[Level 1]], [[Level 2]], [[Level 3]], [[Level 11]], [[Level 16]], [[Level 19]], [[Level 22]], [[Level 28]], and [[Level 139]]. They have been reportedly seen in [[Level 47]] as well, however these claims are not yet confirmed. ==Variants== There are no variants of '''Capillum Aethertemptor,''' though they may have different appearances based on which entity is utilizing them. ==Discovery== The first documented sighting of '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' was in 2004, when a group of [[M.E.G.]] members were exploring Level 1. ==Experiments Conducted== #'''Capillum Aethertemptor''' was cut using a knife. It regenerated once it was out of everyone's sight. #Entities with lower intelligence were placed in the same room as '''Capillum Aethertemptor'''. They confusingly approached it, not knowing what to do with it. #'''Capillum Aethertemptor''' was stationed in a small room guarded by M.E.G. personnel to document how it changes after time. The experiment lasted 50 days, though the strands did not change at all. #A deemed mentally insane individual was forced volunteered to eat '''Capillum Aethertemptor'''. He reported feeling extreme headaches and stomach pain. ==Attached Information== Name explanation: #Capillum: Latin for hair, referencing the hairy-like appearance of the object. #Aethertemptor: A combination of Aether, suggesting celestial nature (the anomalous abilities), and Temptor, meaning one who entices or lures. The object was given a scientific name due to it being one of the earliest discovered objects. It is informally referred to as "Lurestrands", which is used in general discussion of the object. '''Capillum Aethertemptor''' can be used in making meals, though it isn't the most recommended ingredient. If used correctly, it can become edible and tasty.
